query:
SELECT ao.id, ao.name, ao.price, ag.name as group_name, mi.name as item_name, mc.name as category_name
FROM menu_addon_options ao
JOIN menu_addon_groups ag ON ao.addon_group_id = ag.id
JOIN menu_items mi ON ag.menu_item_id = mi.id
JOIN menu_categories mc ON mi.category_id = mc.id
WHERE (ao.name LIKE '%Frango%Lingu%' OR ao.name LIKE '%Somente%Bov%' OR ao.name LIKE '%carnes bovinas%')
ORDER BY mc.name, mi.name, ag.name, ao.name;
